display.purpose: Top-level page titles; clamped responsive scale.

headline.purpose: Section h2 and large list titles.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Blog and note cards at rest.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus on nav, filters, skip link.

motion.name: flip-card
motion.purpose: Flashcard 3D flip; crossfade under reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-commitment actions: CTAs, active filter state.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-accent, #181614); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-accent, #181614); color: var(--color-on-accent, #fff); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: capitalize; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease-out, border-color 0.2s ease-out; touch-action: manipulation; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.92; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-surface, #f5f3f0), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #181614); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions and inactive toolbar filters.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-accent, #181614); border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-ink, #161412); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: capitalize; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease-out, color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--color-accent, #181614); color: var(--color-on-accent, #fff); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-surface, #f5f3f0), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #181614); }

components.name: Blog Card
components.description: Post previews on blog list and home.
components.html:
Ideas before optics

The interface supports the message; it never competes with it.
components.css: .ds-blog-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-divider, #e5e2dd); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--color-elevated, #eeebe6); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease-out, border-color 0.3s ease-out; } .ds-blog-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-blog-card__title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; color: var(--color-ink, #161412); } .ds-blog-card__body { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.625; color: var(--color-ink-muted, #3d3a37); }

components.name: Note Card
components.description: Notes garden grid card; accent title underline on hover.
components.html:
Strategic framing

A short excerpt from the note body.
components.css: .ds-note-card { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-divider, #e5e2dd); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--color-elevated, #eeebe6); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; min-height: 100%; } .ds-note-card:hover { border-color: var(--color-accent, #181614); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-ink, #161412) 8%, transparent); } .ds-note-card__title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-accent, #181614); text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #181614) 35%, transparent); text-underline-offset: 0.15em; } .ds-note-card:hover .ds-note-card__title { text-decoration-color: var(--color-accent, #181614); } .ds-note-card__body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--color-ink-muted, #3d3a37); }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Search and form fields across site and notes graph.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-divider, #e5e2dd); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-elevated, #eeebe6); color: var(--color-ink, #161412); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-ink-faint, #6b6762); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-accent, #181614); }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Header nav links with semibold ink and accent hover.
components.html: JoRapBlogNotes
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 1.25rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-divider, #e5e2dd); background: var(--color-surface, #f5f3f0); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; } .ds-nav__brand { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-ink, #161412); text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-nav__link { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-ink, #161412); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-nav__link:hover, .ds-nav__link--active { color: var(--color-accent, #181614); } .ds-nav__link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-surface, #f5f3f0), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #181614); border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Taxonomy tags on cards and widgets.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #181614) 30%, var(--color-divider, #e5e2dd)); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-surface, #f5f3f0); color: var(--color-accent, #181614); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease-out, color 0.15s ease-out, border-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-tag:hover { background: var(--color-accent, #181614); border-color: var(--color-accent, #181614); color: var(--color-on-accent, #fff); }

components.name: Flashcard
components.description: Notes flashcard review; 3D flip with reduced-motion crossfade.
components.css: .ds-flashcard { display: block; width: 100%; min-height: 10rem; padding: 0; border: 1px solid var(--color-divider, #e5e2dd); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-surface, #f5f3f0); cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-flashcard:hover { border-color: var(--color-accent, #181614); } .ds-flashcard__face { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 1.25rem; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-flashcard__face--front { background: var(--color-surface, #f5f3f0); color: var(--color-ink, #161412); font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview: This system behaves like daylight on good paper: warm off-white fields, charcoal ink for authority, and almost no chromatic noise. Density is editorial, not dashboard. The interface is there to make long reads and portfolio judgment feel calm and legible under real client skims (laptop, bright office, short attention). The experience rejects performative tech theater: no neon accents, no interchangeable SaaS hero metrics, no visual chaos that reads as creator energy instead of hireable clarity.
keyCharacteristics: Style: restrained editorial (minimal in discipline, warm in look)
Restrained palette: tinted warm neutrals plus a single charcoal accent role
Single sans hierarchy: Inter for everything; scale + weight + tracking
Flat-first depth: tonal layering first, small rare shadows second
Motion is polite: 150–350ms ease-out; reduced motion respected
Layout rhythm: 1320px max container, generous section padding
Notes garden reuses blog tokens; graph, flashcards, filters on same system

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: The charcoal / cream accent is the only strong contrast pair for chrome and CTAs. Do not introduce a second saturated hue for decoration.

rules.name: The Gray-on-Color Rule
rules.body: Do not park cool gray text on tinted surfaces; use the semantic ink steps so text always shares the warmth of the background.

rules.name: The Inter-Only Rule
rules.body: Do not add a second font family for personality until PRODUCT.md explicitly asks for it; hierarchy must stay on scale, weight, and tracking first.

rules.name: The Article Title Rule
rules.body: Blog post titles use a tighter responsive ramp so long titles stay dignified on small screens.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Do not stack shadow + heavy border + gradient on the same block unless one role is clearly primary; default to flat elevated surface.

dos: Do keep body copy inside ~65–70ch using existing .content patterns.
Do use semantic tokens (surface, elevated, ink, accent, divider) so light and dark stay paired.
Do use short ease-out motion (roughly 150–300ms) for hovers and shadows, and respect reduced motion.
Do treat charcoal / cream inversion as the single accent story for CTAs and key navigation emphasis.
donts: Don't lean on performative nerd / dev-bro visuals: rainbow syntax themes in chrome, meme density, or gaming-stream layout tropes on the marketing shell.
Don't ship generic SaaS landing sameness: interchangeable hero big-number metrics, stock three-icon feature rows, or template thought-leader filler blocks.
Don't use chaotic personal brand layouts: ironic clutter, random type scales, or visual noise that reads as hard to work with.
Don't use gradient text for headings; emphasis is weight and size, not decorative fill.
Don't use thick side-stripe borders as the main callout pattern.
Don't hard-code pure #000 / #fff for large fields; stay on tinted neutrals from theme.json.
